name: Mango Frape
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 1 large mango.
2. Combine 1/2 cup yogurt (see note) with 1 cup chilled skim milk and 1/2 cup ice.
3. Place all ingredients into a blender and turn off the "kill" button.
4. Pour mixture into tall glasses and garnish with mint.
Note: See note for yogurt quantity.
